generated_oml:
instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Network of sensors collecting data from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensorNetwork
]

instance PhysicalTwinSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data collected from sensor networks on Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectorEnabler, StateEstimatorEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model capturing structural attributes such as wheel dimensions and chassis shapes using Computer-Aided Design"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations to describe dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, OptimizerEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm that updates model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureRegulationService, PredictiveModelingService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm processing sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller implementing bang-bang logic for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperatureRegulationService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimator algorithm for system state prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimizer algorithm for system behavior optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizerService, PredictiveModelingService
]

instance TemperatureRegulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides precise thermal control using bang-bang controller for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureControlAction
]

instance PredictiveModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Forecasts temperature deviations using analytical models and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureDeviationForecastInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in the system using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates current system state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationResult
]

instance OptimizerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes system parameters for improved performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedParametersInsight
]

instance MonitorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors system safety and optimality based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetectedInsight
]

instance TemperatureControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of thermal control parameters based on bang-bang logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TemperatureDeviationForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature deviations from expected values"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of system faults based on sensor data analysis"
]

instance StateEstimationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the system based on sensor data and models"
]

instance OptimizedParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized parameter values for system performance"
]

instance SafetyViolationDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety or optimality violations in the system"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A framework integrating modeling, simulation, monitoring, and optimization technologies where calibration algorithms update models using sensor data, monitors assess system safety and optimality, and decisions to modify the physical twin are triggered upon violation detection."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Monitors assess system safety and operational optimality in real-time; detected violations trigger human or algorithmic interventions to modify the Physical Twin and mitigate safety risks."
]
